content:
RORK — TRANSFER IVX CODE CONTROL TO OWNER GITHUB NOW

OWNER DIRECTIVE:
I do not want Rork controlling my code. My app must live 100% in my GitHub repository.

OFFICIAL OWNER REPO:
gh repo clone ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest

DO NOW:

1. Stop using Rork-managed git remote.
2. Set canonical remote to:
@[github:https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fibb142%2Frork-global-real-estate-invest:GitHub Sync - ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest]

3. Verify:
git remote -v
git branch
git status

4. Push all current IVX code to owner GitHub main.

5. Render must deploy only from owner GitHub:
repo: ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest
branch: main
auto-deploy: ON

6. Remove/disable any Rork git router dependency:
- rork-git-router
- rork-direct
- Rork managed remote
- sandbox-only commit path

7. Verify production:
- GitHub HEAD
- Render deployed SHA
- /health SHA
- /version SHA
- commit match

8. After transfer, IVX IA Senior Developer must work from owner GitHub only.

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

CANONICAL_REPO:
GIT_REMOTE_STATUS:
FILES_PUSHED:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_CONNECTED_REPO:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
PRODUCTION_COMMIT_MATCH:
RORK_CODE_CONTROL_STATUS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only when my GitHub repo is the source of truth and Rork no longer controls the code remote.
